help_text:
🌙 *Quran Bot*

*How to use:*
• Surah name or aya: `Baqarah 255` or `Fatihah 1-7`
• Page number: `page 5`
• Any Arabic text → instant full-Quran search

*Verse buttons:*
📚 Tafsir — Al-Muyassar or Al-Jalalayn
📖 Text — Read inline or download as SRT/LRC
🎧 Audio — MP3 with your chosen reciter
🎬 Video — Generated video with synced audio (landscape or portrait)
📄 Page N — Jump to that Mushaf page

*Commands:*
/start — Main menu
/help — This message
/feedback your message — Send a note or suggestion to the developer

*Stay connected:*
📢 Channel: {channel}
You can also comment on channel posts or send /feedback directly.
hadith_not_found: ⚠️ Could not fetch a hadith right now. Please try again.
